mnemonics.title: Q-Learning Steps
mnemonics.content: SOAP: Select action, Observe reward, Update Q-value, Propagate state

acronyms.usage: Combines Q-Learning with deep neural networks for complex environments

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a chessboard where each square is a state and pieces represent Q-values for actions

analogies.analogy: Like choosing between favorite restaurant (exploit) vs new one (explore)
